data.title: Dexcom stock tumbles 14% post-market amid Q3 earnings report
data.description:
Shares of Dexcom (NASDAQ:DXCM) fell 14% in post-market trading Thursday after the company released its Q3 earnings report which showed only modest topline growth over last year’s quarter.

Dexcom reported that revenue rose 2%, year-over-year, on a reported basis to $994M, with U.S. revenue slipping 2%. Adjusted earnings per share were $0.45, according to a statement.

Analysts, on average, were expecting adjusted EPS of $0.43 on revenue of $991.2M.

Dexcom also reiterated its 2024 guidance of revenue of between $4B and $4.05B. Analysts, on average, are expecting $4.01B.

data.title: Universal Insurance Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.73 beats by $0.30, revenue of $387.55M beats by $45.57M
data.description:
• Universal Insurance press release (NYSE:UVE): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.73 beats by $0.30.
  • Revenue of $387.55M (+7.7% Y/Y) beats by $45.57M.
  • Direct premiums written of $574.4 million, up 8.0% from the prior year quarter
  • Book value per share of $14.15, up 37.0% year-over-year; adjusted book value per share of $15.76, up 12.6% year-over-year
  • Total capital returned to shareholders of $9.1 million, including $4.4 million of share repurchases and a $0.16 per share regular dividend.

data.title: VeriSign GAAP EPS of $2.07 beats by $0.08, revenue of $390.6M beats by $0.41M
data.description:
• VeriSign press release (NASDAQ:VRSN): Q3 GAAP EPS of $2.07 beats by $0.08.
  • Revenue of $390.6M (+3.8% Y/Y) beats by $0.41M.
  • Verisign ended the third quarter of 2024 with cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities of $645 million, a decrease of $281 million from year-end 2023.
  • Cash flow from operations was $253 million for the third quarter of 2024, compared to $245 million for the same quarter of 2023.
  • Deferred revenues as of Sept. 30, 2024 totaled $1.30 billion, an increase of $53 million from year-end 2023.

data.title: Cincinnati Financial Non-GAAP EPS of $1.42 misses by $0.06, revenue of $2.22B misses by $310M
data.description:
• Cincinnati Financial press release (NASDAQ:CINF): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.42 misses by $0.06.
  • Revenue of $2.22B (+9.4% Y/Y) misses by $310M.
  • Third-quarter 2024 net income of $820 million, or $5.20 per share, compared with a net loss of $99 million, or $0.63 per share, in the third quarter of 2023, after recognizing a $645 million third-quarter 2024 after-tax increase in the fair value of equity securities still held.
  • $919 million increase in third-quarter 2024 net income, compared with third-quarter 2023, primarily due to the after-tax net effect of a $956 million increase in net investment gains.
  • $88.32 book value per share at September 30, 2024, up $11.26 since year-end.
  • 17.8% value creation ratio for the first nine months of 2024, compared with 4.4% for the same period of 2023.

data.title: Capri tumbles after judge blocks sale to Tapestry
data.description:
• Capri (NYSE:CPRI) plunged 52% in after hours trading after a federal judge blocked its planned to sale to Tapestry (TPR).
  • US District Judge Jennifer Rochon put the deal on ice after saying that it would be anticompetitive, according to a Bloomberg report.
  • Developing story ...
